ATTY. WAYNE K. SNODGRASS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-4675 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; RESPONDENTS BOARD OF SUPERVISORS OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN and CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED PETITION - THE DEMURRER TO THE ENTIRE COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED, THE 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THEY DO NOT RELATE TO THE FACTS IN THE INITIAL PAPERS AND ARE TIME BARRED. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Continued To Jan-07-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Wayne K. Snodgrass, Deputy City Attorney; No other appearances.

RULING: Matter discussed. At conclusion of discussion, The Court modified its tentative ruling. RESPONDENTS BOARD OF SUPERVISORS OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO & CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER is continued on the court's own motion to January 7, 2013. Counsel for the respondents shall provide notice of new date to opposing counsel. Judge: Marla Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Continued To Dec-13-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
RESPONDENTS BOARD OF SUPERVISORS OF THE CITY AND COUNTY, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER. The Demurrer is continued to December 13, 2012, per stipulation. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR # 11312 =(302/MJM)
